```sh
$ git branch
  Z
* D

$ git show-branch
! [Z] Z
 * [D] D
--
 * [D] D
 * [D^] C
 * [D~2] B
+  [Z]Z
+  [Z^]Y
+  [Z~2] X
+  [Z~3] W
+* [D~3] A

```

```sh
$ git checkout Z # switch to the Z branch
$ git merge D # merge commits B, C and D into Z

```

```sh
$ git checkout Z # switch to the Z branch
$ git rebase D # change Z’s base commit to point to D

```
